update.releaseNotes:
v5.6.0 - Changelog
> [!NOTE] > Note that `armeabi-v7a` has been dropped in favor of `x86_64`. Installing this variant on x86 devices results in a significant performance boost. You may need to increase `Wait Delay` setting since the bot will now be going super fast in order to avoid issues because of it.
New --- - Add `Smart Race Solver` on the `Racing Settings` page, an optimization-based race scheduler that replaces the older `Smart Racing Plan`. The solver takes the trainee's aptitudes and target / forced epithets to produce a 72-turn schedule similar to how https://race.daftuyda.moe does it. - Add `Ask the Docs` - an optional, on-device offline documentation chatbot under a new `LLM Settings` page. The RAG chat pipeline uses a bundled `MiniLM ONNX` embedder to find the most relevant excerpts from `README.md`, `HOW_IT_WORKS.md`, the in-app search config, and the Kotlin source code, and a user-downloaded Qwen GGUF model (run via `llama.rn`) or a custom model that the user downloads via Hugging Face paraphrases them. - Add `Race History` calendar to the `Remote Log Viewer` showing the bot's wins, losses, and pending races over the 72-turn scenario, with per-cell tooltips that surface epithet progression and per-matcher condition labels. Note this only appears when the `Smart Race Solver` is enabled. - Add separate `Event choice stat priority` and `Summer training stat priority` lists in the `Training Settings` page so Summer turns and event choices can lean into a different stat order from the rest of the year. - Add `Trackblazer Low Main Stat Gain Item Floor` scenario override so the bot conserves `Charm` and `Reset Whistles` on low-mood turns where the selected training's main stat gain falls below the specified floor. - Add `Log Files` tab to the `Remote Log Viewer` for browsing past run logs without needing ADB. - Add a unified first-time setup dialog on the Home page that walks the user through the accessibility, overlay, and battery-optimization permissions in one place. - Add a `x86_64` build variant for x86_64 Android devices for a significant performance boost and replaces the old `armeabi-v7a` build variant. - Add a new `Home` page warning for x86_64 devices running the `arm64-v8a` build variant. - Add a per-skill blacklist and `Skip All Green Skills` / `Skip All Red Skills (Debuffs)` / `Skip All Unique Skills` category exclusions to each `Skill Plan` page.
Adjustments --- - Update game data up to `Ines Fujin` (2026-04-29). - Update Automation Library version to `2.5.6` for guidance region touch interception fix. - Remove the `Stop on Unexpected Popups` setting to avoid future issues from leaving it on. - Remove the `Purchase All Inherited Unique Skills` setting due to conflicting with the new `Skip All Unique Skills` filter. - Rename the energy-based selection toggles in the `Training Event Settings` page for race events to `Energy-aware swap` and rework option selection so the bot swaps to the selected option only when the trainee is actually low on energy. - Skip opening the `Training Items` dialog when the only items in inventory would be filtered out anyway - low-tier energy items reserved for emergency race recovery, megaphones / charm filtered by their priority rules, or condition heals with no matching active negative status. - Enable the Gradle build cache and drop the duplicate JS bundle pipeline for faster local builds. - Improve app performance when toggling settings on/off and reduce lag and hitches from DB writes and page navigation.
Fixes --- - Fix bug where `CustomSlider`'s track did not match up with the thumb position when dragging. - Fix bug where the very first failure-chance OCR read on a `Training` screen entry could come back unparseable. The bot now retries once by re-entering the `Training` screen via `recoverAndRetryFailureChance()` before giving up. - Fix `Trackblazer` OCR bug where a lone `L` character was being read for the digit `1` when the Shop Coin count was exactly 1.
